overview: OK Rentals — a luxury car rental platform with booking, membership plans, admin dashboard, reviews, ID verification, messaging, and VIP email list.
features: Vehicle fleet listings with photos and pricing
ID verification with driver's license and SSN
Insurance waiver digital signature at checkout
Driver reviews and ratings on vehicles
Trip condition photos before and after rental
Booking status flow: Pending to Returned
In-app messaging between renter and admin
VIP email list with promotional email sending
